title: acer pseudosieboldianum subsp. takesimense
intro: Acer pseudosieboldianum subsp. takesimense is a sub-species of the Korean maple tree, native to the Korean Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
